name: Pet Leash Cord 1.6m
shortDescription: Elevating your range of dog accessories and pet accessories, this lead could be used to control dogs when around other dogs or hazardous areas as the road. The colour/style received with online purchases is chosen randomly.
description: Play for the active dog lead is available in 3 assorted colors: Black, Red and Grey and Blue. Ideal for keeping dogs safe and under control during dog walking and training activities, the lead is a durable polyester design which can be used with dog harnesses and dog collars. Length; 1.6m 3 Assorted colors; Black, Blue, Grey and Red Material: Polyester Elevating your range of dog accessories and pet accessories, this lead can be used to control dogs when around other dogs or hazardous areas as the road.
